item.title: Reading list
item.description:
I love to read, and I try to allocate to book as much time as I can. Books makes you travel without renouncing the comfort of your sofa and the warmth of a cup a tea. They are teachers and explorers. Throughout the years I have been reading a decent number of books, here I am trying to track down what has been my journey as a reader.

Currently reading

  • Consciousness and the brain, deciphering how the brain codes our thoughts by Stanislas Dehaene. This is an interesting read about ourselves. First of all there is a lot of imprecision surrounding the definition of counsciousness. What does it mean to be conscious of possess consciousness?

Essays

  • 21 lecciones para el siglo XXI - Juval Noah Harari (2018) (spanish)

Technology

  • X networks

Physics

  • Black holes & time warps - Kip Thorne (english)
